content.en:
In the blink of an eye, a month has passed.

Ye Tian opened his eyes, and the depths of his eyes were full of joy.

"Eighty percent of the two sword path realms are a little worse than expected, but I didn't expect that after the sword path realm reached eighty percent, even the effect of the Purple Mountain Sword Realm on me has weakened a lot, and now a sword path holy land like the Purple Mountain Sword Realm is almost useless to me!"

Ye Tian said helplessly.

If he wanted to continue to improve the Sword Dao realm, he had to use a higher Sword Dao Holy Land, otherwise he could only rely on the long years to slowly comprehend the Dao Dao realm.

A month has passed, and if he continues to cultivate, his points will be automatically deducted.

Therefore, Ye Tian got up and left the Purple Mountain Sword Realm.

Returning to his cultivation tower, Ye Tian began to cultivate the Heartless Divine Sword Technique.

There is a special cultivation space in the cultivation tower, which is enough to withstand the attacks of His Highness's level, even if Ye Tian uses his sword skills with all his might, it will not destroy this cultivation space, which is enough for Ye Tian to unscrupulously perform the Heartless Divine Sword Technique again and again.

As a result, Ye Tian began to frantically cultivate the Heartless Divine Sword Technique, striving to cultivate the Heartless Divine Sword Technique to the Xiaocheng realm.

Two months later, the Heartless Divine Sword Technique was finally cultivated by Ye Tian to the Xiaocheng realm.

Subsequently, Ye Tian entered the Illusory World Battle Tower and tried to challenge the third layer of the Battle Tower, but he was defeated, and his strength was still a little worse.

However, Ye Tian can now be regarded as the top combat power of the second-grade ordinary-level cosmic son, and he is not far from the first-grade ordinary-level cosmic son.

this day.

"Ziya, do you know when the Great Sacrifice of the Divine Code began?" Ye Tian asked.

His current strength has fallen into a bottleneck period, and there is no way to improve the Dao realm for the time being, and it is difficult to continue to improve in terms of supernatural powers.

As for other secret techniques, even if they are cultivated, it is difficult to improve their strength.

Therefore, Ye Tian could only put his expectations on the gods.

The Divine Codex is only possessed by the Supreme Hall of the Human Race, and it is also the highest inheritance of the children of the universe.

If you don't cultivate the Divine Codex, it will be difficult to raise your strength to the pinnacle-level Son of the Universe and the Eternal Universe Child.

In the Purple Mountain Sword Realm, His Highness Beishan said that in the previous battle with the alien race, the three Constant-level Highnesses in the Yellow Rank region had all fallen.

And a hundred years later, another prosperous era is coming, and Ye Tian will at least raise his strength to the Son of the Universe at the level of Eternal Universe, so that he can hope to control his own destiny.

Otherwise, once you participate in that prosperous era, you can only rely on luck to survive.

Ye Tian never attributed life to luck, luck is too mysterious.

Those children of the universe, which one is not lucky, I don't know how good luck is, you can meet the opportunity casually, and it is not in the fight with the alien race!

Of course, Ye Tian would not be afraid of that prosperous era, and even a little eager to participate in that prosperous era.

Because the arrival of the prosperous era will inevitably mean that there is a great opportunity to be born.

After all, if there were no competing interests, it would be impossible for the Terrans to put the Children of the Universe in danger.

There are two sides to everything, and when there is a crisis, there is an opportunity.

No matter what the situation, strength is the foundation of everything.

Therefore, Ye Tian really wanted to improve his strength quickly, and cultivating the Divine Code was the way for Ye Tian to quickly improve his strength.

"Master, there are still a few of the highnesses of the Supreme Hall of the Human Race who have not yet arrived, and when all the highnesses arrive, the divine sacrifice will be opened!" Ziya said.

"I see!"

Ye Tian understood.

According to Ziya, the Divine Ritual will start soon.

In the blink of an eye, another half a month has passed.

On this day, Ziya came to see Ye Tian.

"Master, the high-level officials of the Supreme Hall of the Human Race have been informed, and the Divine Ritual Sacrifice will start in three days!" Ziya said.

"It's finally getting started!"

Ye Tian was very excited.

"Is there anything I need to pay attention to when participating in the Divine Festival?" Ye Tian asked.

Ziya thought for a while, and then said: "Master, there are many divine scriptures in the supreme hall of the human race, and each divine code is different, and the cultivation requirements are also different. In short, the more powerful the canon, the higher the requirements, and the master had better find a canon that best suits him. In addition, if you want to get the Divine Codex, you must get the approval of the Divine Codex, otherwise, there is no way to obtain the Divine Codex Inheritance! The Divine Code Great Sacrifice only has one day, and if you haven't obtained the Divine Inheritance within one day, then you can only wait for the next chance!"

"One day!"

Ye Tian secretly remembered.

Three days later.

Ye Tian followed Ziya to the place where the Divine Ritual was located.

I saw Ziya open the doors of one space after another, constantly shuttling, and finally came to the space where the Divine Sacrifice was located.

This space has a very large altar with majestic statues around the altar.

There are seventy-eight of these statues, both male and female.

After Ziya's explanation, Ye Tian knew that the owners of these statues were all the top existences of the human race, and each of them had an unimaginable reputation among all the races in the universe.

A powerhouse like the undead army master in the disk domain is just an ant in the eyes of these seventy-eight top existences.

At this time, many highnesses have gathered here, including His Highness the White Bone.

His Royal Highness the White Bone saw Ye Tian and walked over.

Both of them belong to the children of the universe of the disk, so they are naturally closer.

"His Highness Wanfa!"

"His Highness the White Bone!"

Ye Tian and His Royal Highness Bai Gu greeted each other, and the two immediately chatted.

It didn't take long for about 100 Sons of the Universe to gather here.

The human race currently has seventy-two star fields, and each star field has given birth to an average of 2 children of the universe during this period, which is equivalent to 72 children of the universe, and some star fields are relatively powerful, and the children of the universe are naturally a little more, so it is not surprising that 100 new children of the universe appear at once.

In the end, the number of children of the universe was frozen - 103 children of the universe!

Then.

A flash of light turned into a figure.

There are six people in total, and each person's breath is as vast as the universe.

"It's the six cosmic gods!"

Bai Gu Tianjiao said in slight surprise.

The cosmic god is a realm beyond the level of the galaxy, and the Lord of Immortality is in this realm.

Only the four hegemon-level forces in the entire domain have cosmic gods, and each overlord-level force has a maximum of two cosmic gods, and some overlord-level forces even have only one cosmic god.

It can be seen that there are few cosmic gods, and there is hardly a cosmic god in ordinary times.

For example, Ye Tian has never seen a cosmic god in the Disk Domain.

And now, I saw six cosmic gods at once.

Ye Tian was not very far away from these six cosmic gods, only 1,000 meters.

Although his copying talent had been suppressed a lot in the Supreme Hall of the Terran Race, after the transformation of the origin of the universe last time, the enveloping range of the copying talent had expanded greatly, even in the Supreme Hall of the Terran race, it was enough to cover a range of several thousand meters, so it enveloped these six cosmic gods at once.

"Six Universe-level cultivation talents!"

If it was before, Ye Tian would have felt excited, but now he didn't have a look of too excitement.

Because in addition to these six cosmic gods who possessed universe-level cultivation talents, among the 103 highnesses present, there were also several universe-level cultivation talents.

Therefore, he does not lack a universe-level cultivation talent.

"Universe-level cultivation talent, copy!"

"Universe-level cultivation talent, copy!"

......

Ye Tian copied these Universe-level cultivation talents one by one, although he only needed one Universe-level cultivation talent, it was not a bad thing to copy a few more and integrate them into his own talents.

After he returns, he will be able to fuse the Yu-level cultivation talent and transform his cultivation talent, and then he will be able to have a cultivation talent above the Yu level.

Then.

One of the cosmic gods on the altar spoke: "I am the town hall envoy of the yellow-level area of the Terran Supreme Palace, the Shentai Divine Lord, this time with the other five town hall envoys are responsible for opening the Divine Ritual Sacrifice, you are all new highnesses of the Terran Supreme Palace, there are some rules I must say." "

The Shentai Divine Lord basically changed the sentences that Ziya said to Ye Tian before, and the general meaning was almost the same.

After saying these rules, the god lord of the platform said: "The divine festival will start soon, everyone get ready, choose the divine canon that fits you, but don't be too ambitious, although some canons are very powerful, but the difficulty of cultivation is too high, even if they fit, it is best not to choose." Each Highness can only cultivate one divine canon, and there is no second choice. "

Many of the highnesses in the audience nodded one after another, but no one knew what they thought in their hearts.

Bang!!!!

The six cosmic gods moved the altar, and the seventy-eight statues around the entire altar began to glow brightly.

These rays of light converged to form a vast circle.

Suddenly, the void cracked, and a corner of the world descended on this space.

That world is the world of the gods, and there are a lot of gods.

"Enter the world of the gods!"

The Divine Lord said.

Whew!!

A famous highness couldn't wait to fly into the world of the gods, and Ye Tian and His Highness the White Bone also flew in.

The Temple Legacy selection has begun!
